args: SECRETS_DIR="${CODEX_SECRETS_DIR:-${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/secrets}"; SECRET_FILE="$SECRETS_DIR/pixellab.env"; if [ ! -f "$SECRET_FILE" ]; then echo "Missing CODEX_SECRETS_DIR/pixellab.env with AUTH_HEADER=Bearer <token>" >&2; exit 1; fi; set -a; source "$SECRET_FILE"; set +a; if [ -z "${AUTH_HEADER:-}" ]; then echo "Missing AUTH_HEADER in CODEX_SECRETS_DIR/pixellab.env" >&2; exit 1; fi; NPX="$(command -v npx || true)"; if [ -z "$NPX" ] && [ -n "${CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR:-}" ] && [ -x "$CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/npx" ]; then NPX="$CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/npx"; fi; if [ -z "$NPX" ]; then echo "npx not found" >&2; exit 127; fi; exec "$NPX" -y mcp-remote@latest https://api.pixellab.ai/mcp --transport http-only --header 'Authorization:${AUTH_HEADER}'
